title: Jimtendo's Rock Candy Mod
description: 10 types of delicious Rock Candy complete with  tools and armor that gives special effects when used!
body:
## Description

This is a port of [Dralard's Rock Candy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dralards-rock-candy-mod) Mod for 1.8.9.

![Rock Candy Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/285210624052448a63496f41899a6d3cba017aac.png)

Adds in 10 delicious flavors of rock candy, each giving different potion effects when consumed.

You can then condense 9 of the same colored candy into a block to create tools and armor.



Just holding the rock candy tools in your hand or wearing the full armor set gives you buffs!



5 types of rock candy ore are found between depth 0 and 45, so finding them is easy. Combine those 5 into 5 additional types of unique rock candy!

So, grab a pickaxe and start hunting for your brand-new food source!



Recipes:

Here is a list of the recipes included with this Mod.

![Candy Toolrod recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8059d05a7af26d96a43d16f0b08f97eeafa8d8b3.gif)

![Rock Candy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bb409369de7bb3caefb735e615063ce767b35c2.gif)
